title: Farmhouse Cross Back Bar Stool - Limewash
features: The Farmhouse Cross Back Bar Stool from EventStable offers a perfect blend of rustic charm and practical elegance, making it an ideal choice for event venues, restaurants, and everyday spaces.
Crafted from high-quality beechwood, this commercial-grade bar stool features a beautifully curved cross-back design, providing not only timeless visual appeal but also sturdy support.
The lightly distressed finish enhances its farmhouse aesthetic, giving each piece unique character.
With a comfortable 30'' seat height, this seating option is perfect for bar counters, cocktail tables or other high-top dining, while adding a welcoming touch to any setting.
Its versatile style complements a wide range of décor, from rustic and vintage-inspired venues to modern, laid-back spaces.
Designed for both durability and comfort, the farmhouse cross back bar stool is built to withstand the demands of frequent use while maintaining its charm.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 50 or more
